static Pass * createPass (AnalysisID ID)

Detailed Description

ForwardControlFlowIntegrity uses the information from JumpInstrTableInfo to prepend checks to indirect calls to make sure that these calls target valid locations.

Definition at line 36 of file ForwardControlFlowIntegrity.h.

Member Function Documentation

◆ getAnalysisUsage()

void ForwardControlFlowIntegrity::getAnalysisUsage ( AnalysisUsage & ) const
overridevirtual

getAnalysisUsage - This function should be overriden by passes that need analysis information to do their job. If a pass specifies that it uses a particular analysis result to this function, it can then use the getAnalysis<AnalysisType>() function, below.

Reimplemented from llvm::Pass.

References llvm::AnalysisUsage::addRequired().

◆ getPassName()

const char * llvm::ForwardControlFlowIntegrity::getPassName ( ) const
inlineoverridevirtual

getPassName - Return a nice clean name for a pass. This usually implemented in terms of the name that is registered by one of the Registration templates, but can be overloaded directly.

Reimplemented from llvm::Pass.

Definition at line 49 of file ForwardControlFlowIntegrity.h.

◆ runOnModule()

bool ForwardControlFlowIntegrity::runOnModule ( Module & M)
overridevirtual

Runs the CFI pass on a given module. This works best if the module in question is the result of link-time optimization (see lib/LTO).

Implements llvm::ModulePass.

Definition at line 174 of file ForwardControlFlowIntegrity.cpp.
